neurotabs 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Driving neurotabs from the Command Line
    • Understanding the NFTab Specification

Package index

All functions

nf_analyze()
Exploratory term tests over an NFTab feature
nf_apply()
Apply a function or fixed operation to a feature row-by-row
nf_arrange()
Arrange (sort) observations
nf_axes()
Observation axes
nf_axis_domain()
Declare an axis domain
nf_axis_info()
Axis metadata for a feature axis
nf_axis_labels()
Read axis labels for a feature axis
nf_backends()
List registered backends
nf_cli()
Run the neurotabs command-line interface
nf_col()
Create a column reference (ValueSource)
nf_col_schema()
Declare a scalar column schema
nf_collect()
Collect (resolve) a feature for all rows
nf_collect_array()
Collect a volumetric feature as a stacked array with spatial metadata
nf_columns_encoding()
Create a columns encoding
nf_compare()
Compare summarized feature values to a reference group
nf_compatible()
Check strict concatenation compatibility
nf_concat()
Concatenate NFTab datasets (strict row-wise)
nf_design()
Design columns (observation table as data.frame)
nf_drill()
Drill from a summary nftab back to contributing member rows
nf_extension()
Retrieve one manifest extension
nf_extensions()
Manifest extension entries
nf_feature()
Declare a feature schema
nf_feature_names()
Feature names
nf_feature_schema()
Logical schema for a feature
nf_filter()
Filter observations by design predicates
nf_from_table()
Create an nftab from a table and external feature files
nf_group_by()
Group observations by design columns
nf_ingest_parcel_csv()
Ingest a parcel-signal CSV into an nftab
nf_ingest_parcel_h5()
Ingest a parcellated fmristore HDF5 file into an nftab
nf_logical_schema()
Declare a logical feature schema
nf_manifest()
Create an NFTab manifest
nf_matched_cohort()
Build a matched reference cohort by exact column matching
nf_mutate()
Mutate observation columns
nf_mutate_feature()
Mutate a derived feature
nf_nobs()
Number of observations
nf_read()
Read an NFTab dataset from a manifest file
nf_ref_encoding()
Create a ref encoding
nf_register_backend()
Register a backend adapter
nf_resolve()
Resolve a single feature value for one row
nf_resolve_all()
Resolve all rows for a feature
nf_sample()
Sample feature values at spatial coordinates across all observations
nf_schema_fingerprint()
Compute a schema fingerprint for compatibility checking
nf_select()
Select observation columns
nf_summarize() nf_summarise()
Summarize a feature across rows or groups
nf_support()
Declare a generic support descriptor
nf_support_generic()
Declare a generic support descriptor
nf_support_info()
Retrieve one manifest support
nf_support_parcel()
Declare a parcel support descriptor
nf_support_surface()
Declare a surface support descriptor
nf_support_volume()
Declare a volume support descriptor
nf_supports()
Manifest supports
nf_ungroup()
Drop grouping metadata
nf_validate()
Validate an NFTab dataset
nf_write()
Write an NFTab dataset to disk (table-package profile)
nftab()
Create an NFTab dataset object
`[`(<nftab>)
Subset an nftab by row indices

Developed by Brad Buchsbaum.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
